name: Chicken Fried Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into serving pieces.
2. Pound the steak thoroughly.
3. Mix the eggs and milk.
4. Dip the meat into the egg mixture, then into cracker crumbs.
5. Brown slowly on both sides in hot shortening.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Cover tightly and cook over very low heat for 45 to 60 minutes or until tender.
8. Serve with South Gravy over steaks.
9. Makes 6 servings.
